headline: Best comedy picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better comedy picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring Dream Girl, The Who Was Show, and Bhool Bhulaiyaa — plus more comedy picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: Dream Girl
selected_titles.description: A Hindi comedy about a man with a talent for mimicking female voices.

selected_titles.title: The Who Was Show
selected_titles.description: Learn about people who had a big impact on the world in a funny way, Great family watch.

selected_titles.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
selected_titles.description: A Hindi comedy-horror about a psychiatrist trying to solve the mystery of a haunted palace.

selected_titles.title: happy gilmore 1
selected_titles.description: A hockey player turned golfer uses his slap shot to dominate the golf course.

selected_titles.title: two much
selected_titles.description: The talk show, hosted by Kajol and Twinkle, promises candid conversations.

selected_titles.title: Richie Rich
selected_titles.description: A family comedy about the richest kid in the world and his adventures.

selected_titles.title: Great Indian Kapil Show S 2
selected_titles.description: The second season of a popular Hindi comedy show featuring stand-up and celebrity interviews.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
